title: gazania pavonia
intro: Gazania pavonia, also known as the African daisy or country daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gazania pavonia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
